parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: List domain events for the merchant business (keyset cursor pagination).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: Get a single domain event by ID.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Create a new product for the merchant business. Idempotency-Key required on retries.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: List products for the merchant business (cursor pagination, active=true default).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: Get a single product by ID.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

patch.summary: Update mutable fields on a product. Idempotency-Key required on retries.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

delete.summary: Archive a product (soft-delete: sets active=false, cascades to prices).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Upload a product image (multipart "file": SVG/PNG/JPEG, max 2 MB). Stores in object storage, sets imageUrl, emits a product.updated audit row.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Create a new price for a product. Product must be active. Idempotency-Key required on retries.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: List prices for the merchant business (cursor pagination, optional ?productId= filter).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: Get a single price by ID.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

patch.summary: Update mutable fields on a price. Idempotency-Key required on retries.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Create a checkout session for a price. Returns a cs_ id + a one-time public URL carrying the raw token. Idempotency-Key required on retries.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Create a subscription for a customer. Idempotency-Key required on retries. Charge is immediate unless price has a trial and skipTrial=false.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: List subscriptions for the merchant business. Cursor pagination. Optional ?status= filter (trialing|active|past_due|unpaid|cancelled).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: Get a single subscription by ID.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

patch.summary: Update mutable fields on a subscription: metadata (partial merge) and cancelAtPeriodEnd (one-way, can only be set to true).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Cancel a subscription. Default (cancelAtPeriodEnd=false) is immediate. Set cancelAtPeriodEnd=true to cancel at period end.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: List invoices for the merchant business. Cursor pagination. Optional ?status= filter (open|paid|void|uncollectible).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Create a subscription-scoped invoice in draft status. Idempotency-Key required on retries.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: Get a single invoice by ID.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

patch.summary: Update an invoice status. body { status: "void" } voids an open invoice; body { status: "paid" } marks an open invoice paid. Non-open is rejected 4xx.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Finalize a draft invoice (draft→open). Returns the persisted invoice and the resolved customer email (sent_to_email) when reachable.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: List the invoice event timeline (bare array, ascending). FE-vocabulary invoice.* events only.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Register a new webhook endpoint for the merchant business. Returns the generated signing secret — shown only once and must be stored securely.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: List webhook endpoints for the merchant business. Cursor pagination. Secret is never returned in list responses.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: Get a single webhook endpoint by ID. Secret is excluded.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

patch.summary: Update mutable fields on a webhook endpoint: url, enabled_events, active, metadata.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

delete.summary: Delete a webhook endpoint and all its outbox entries.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: List the most-recent deliveries for a webhook endpoint, each with its per-attempt history and a derived status. Read-only projection of the outbox + delivery-attempts tables. Default limit 30. Returns a BARE ARRAY (NOT a { items, nextCursor } cursor page) — the FE deliveries timeline consumes ReadonlyArray<WebhookDelivery>; deliberate divergence from the list-envelope convention.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Rotate the signing secret for an endpoint. Invalidates the old secret immediately and returns the new secret once. Update your webhook receiver with the new secret promptly.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Send a test event to the endpoint immediately. The event is enqueued for immediate delivery via BullMQ — no scheduling delay. Use this to verify the endpoint URL, signing secret, and handler is correct.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Replay all failed deliveries for this endpoint. Resets status from "failed" to "pending" and immediately retries via BullMQ. Only endpoints owned by the merchant business are affected.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

post.summary: Create a new customer for the merchant business. Idempotency-Key required on retries.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: List customers for the merchant business (cursor pagination, archived excluded).

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

get.summary: Get a single customer by ID.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)

patch.summary: Update mutable fields on a customer. Idempotency-Key required on retries.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on every mutating /v1/* endpoint (Phase 1 fixture relaxes to optional)
